title: tropaeolum deckerianum var. tomentosum
intro: Tropaeolum deckerianum var. tomentosum, also known as the hairy-flowered Flor de Mayo, is a variety of the Flor de Mayo plant, belonging to the Tropaeolaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots are used to treat fever and inflammation. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of alkaloids and glycosides, which provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antipyretic. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, often used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
